title: Assign Agent to Slot
name: assign_agent
description: Create an agent from an identity path and assign it to a slot in the current harness session. Use this to dynamically add agents to the running harness.

identity_path.description: Path to the identity directory for the new agent (e.g. 'identity/dante')

slot_name.description: The slot name to assign this agent to in the current harness

author: admin
